nasb.text: as it is written, “He scattered abroad, he gave to the poor, His righteousness endures forever.”

esv.text: As it is written, “He has distributed freely, he has given to the poor; his righteousness endures forever.”

cnv.text: 如經上所說： “他廣施錢財，賙濟窮人； 他的仁義，存到永遠。”

ccb.text: 正如圣经上说： “他慷慨施舍、周济穷人， 他的仁义永远长存。”

csbs.text: 正如经上所记： “他施舍，赐予穷人； 他的义行永远常存。”
